intent: Single-screen accessibility variant of the consumer-loan mask with WCAG-AAA-grade visual styling and explicit a11y metadata: tab-index hints, aria-live regions, screen-reader labels and a focus-management policy on submit failures.
notes: Tier-3 banking adversarial (a11y stress for European Accessibility Act): same logical fields as Konsumentenkredit but every label carries explicit a11y context (tab-index, aria-listbox, aria-live, focus-restore policy). Three INFORMATIVE_LABEL nodes encode error-summary, keyboard-hint and contrast policy as separate machine-readable surfaces; the harness must turn these into observable assertions in any accessibility-class test case (Tastaturbedienung, Fokusreihenfolge, Live-Region-Ankuendigung) without inventing concrete WCAG criteria the source does not specify (rubric section 5).
